summary.verdict_desc: 本周计数微改善（5 红 / 6 黄 / 12 绿，上周 5/7/11），广度大幅好转（S5FI 45.5%→71%）使黄灯减少一个，red_pct 维持 21.7%、加权风险分略降至 34.8%，基础判读仍在观察期——但分类强制升级再次生效：估值 2/3 红（CAPE 42.04、Top-5 ≈27.9%）叠加资金面 3/4 红（Mag4 FCF 深度负值、VC AI 占比回升至 80%、NVDA 客户投资/收入 43%）。本周关键事件：NVDA Q1 FY27 营收 $81.6B（+85% YoY）、Q2 指引 $91B 双双超预期，带动 S5FI 暴涨 25pp 至 71%；SpaceX 5/20 提交 S-1，目标 6/12 以 $1.75T 估值上市（史上最大 IPO）；Anthropic ARR 估计突破 $44B（每 6 周翻倍），日增 ~$96M。估值 + 资金面双类共振触发分类强制升级。
summary.verdict_desc_en: Counts slightly improved this week (5 red / 6 yellow / 12 green vs. 5/7/11 last week) as breadth surged (S5FI 45.5% → 71%), trimming one yellow; red_pct holds at 21.7% and the weighted risk score dipped to 34.8%, still in the Observation band on the base framework. But the category-override rule triggers once more: valuation 2/3 RED (CAPE 42.04, Top-5 ≈27.9%) plus capital 3/4 RED (Mag4 FCF still deeply negative, VC AI share back to 80%, NVDA customer-financing ratio 43%). Key events: NVDA Q1 FY27 revenue $81.6B (+85% YoY) and Q2 guidance of $91B both beat, fueling a 25pp breadth surge to 71%; SpaceX filed its S-1 on May 20, targeting a $1.75T June 12 listing (the largest IPO ever); Anthropic ARR estimated at $44B, doubling every six weeks, adding ~$96M per day. Valuation + capital dual-category resonance triggers the forced upgrade.

wow_changes.note: S5FI 由 45.5% 跃升至 71%（+25.5pp），NVDA 财报超预期引发大盘广度大幅改善，远离 40% 红线
wow_changes.note_en: S5FI surged from 45.5% to 71% (+25.5pp), driven by NVDA's Q1 earnings beat and a broad-based rally — now well clear of the 40% red line

wow_changes.note: Q1 2026 VC 数据发布：$297B 中 AI 占 80%（$242B），较上期 4 月 66% 回升；OpenAI $122B 轮占 Q1 全球 VC 的 41%
wow_changes.note_en: Q1 2026 VC data published: AI captured 80% of a record $297B, up from 66% last month; OpenAI's $122B round alone took 41% of all global VC

wow_changes.note: NVDA Q1 FY27 营收 $81.6B 推升 LTM 至 $253.5B，使累计客户融资/收入比由 67% 压缩至 ~43%；NVDA 同时宣布暂停新 AI 初创投注
wow_changes.note_en: NVDA's Q1 FY27 revenue of $81.6B lifted LTM to $253.5B, compressing the customer-financing ratio from 67% to ~43%; NVDA also announced a pause on new AI startup equity bets

wow_changes.note: SpaceX 5/20 提交 S-1，目标 6/12 以 $1.75T 估值上市——将成为史上最大 IPO，AI/科技一级市场管道持续升温
wow_changes.note_en: SpaceX filed its S-1 on May 20, targeting a June 12 listing at $1.75T — set to become the largest IPO in history, further heating the AI/tech primary market pipeline

wow_changes.note: Anthropic ARR 由 4 月 $30B 飙升至 5 月估 $44B（每 6 周翻倍、日增 ~$96M），正式拉开与 OpenAI 差距
wow_changes.note_en: Anthropic ARR surged from $30B in April to an estimated $44B in May — doubling every 6 weeks, adding ~$96M per day, decisively widening the gap over OpenAI

indicators.note: CAPE 升至 42.04（较上周 41.66 微升 0.38），155 年来第 2 高，距 2000 年峰值 44.19 仅 5%；NVDA 财报推动大盘走强但估值继续高位运行
indicators.note_en: CAPE ticked up to 42.04 from 41.66 last week, still the 2nd-highest reading in 155 years, just 5% below the 2000 peak of 44.19; the post-NVDA rally lifted equities but kept valuations stretched

indicators.note: NVDA 盈利超预期后跃升至 SPY 权重第一（8.35%），AAPL 7.01%、MSFT 4.87%、AMZN 4.11%、GOOGL 3.53%；Top-5 合计 ≈27.9%，集中度仍贴 2000 年极值
indicators.note_en: NVDA leapfrogged to the #1 SPY weight (8.35%) after its Q1 beat, followed by AAPL 7.01%, MSFT 4.87%, AMZN 4.11%, GOOGL 3.53%; Top-5 total ≈27.9%, concentration still pinned near the 2000 extreme

indicators.note: Q1 FY27 营收 $81.6B（+85% YoY）、Q2 指引 $91B 均超预期后，GuruFocus 25.77、StockAnalysis 25.1、Finbox 24.1，区间 24-26x；FY28 EPS 预期上修使远期倍数维持低位
indicators.note_en: After Q1 FY27 revenue of $81.6B (+85% YoY) and Q2 guidance of $91B both beat, forward PE sits at 25.8x across sources (GuruFocus 25.77, StockAnalysis 25.1, Finbox 24.1); FY28 EPS upgrades keep the multiple compressed

indicators.threshold_text: 指引下调=红 / 加速=黄 / 稳健=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Guidance cut = red / Accelerating = yellow / Steady = green
indicators.note: Q1 财报后四大 hyperscaler 指引合计 $700-725B（MSFT $190B、AMZN $200B、GOOGL $175-185B、META 上调至 $125-145B），YoY +77%；三家上调指引无一下调，继续加速
indicators.note_en: Post-Q1 the four hyperscalers guide $700-725B combined (MSFT $190B, AMZN $200B, GOOGL $175-185B, META raised to $125-145B), +77% YoY; three raised guidance with none cutting — still accelerating

indicators.note: Amazon 尾随 FCF 暴跌 95% 至 $1.2B（capex $44.2B +77% YoY）；Pivotal 预估 GOOGL FCF 同比 -90%（至 $8.2B）；MSFT 为唯一 FCF 正增长 hyperscaler（Evercore +5%）；Meta capex 上调继续吞噬现金流
indicators.note_en: Amazon trailing FCF plunged 95% to $1.2B as capex hit $44.2B (+77% YoY); Pivotal Research forecasts GOOGL FCF down ~90% to $8.2B; MSFT is the only hyperscaler still growing FCF (Evercore +5%); Meta's capex hike continues to swallow cash

indicators.name_zh: AI 占 VC 投资比重
indicators.note: Crunchbase Q1 2026：全球 VC 创纪录 $297B，AI 占 80%（$242B）；OpenAI $122B、Anthropic $30B、xAI $20B、Waymo $16B 四大轮合计占全球 VC 65%；较上期 4 月 66% 回升至季度水位
indicators.note_en: Crunchbase Q1 2026: global VC hit a record $297B with AI capturing 80% ($242B); the four largest rounds — OpenAI $122B, Anthropic $30B, xAI $20B, Waymo $16B — accounted for 65% of all global VC; back up from April's 66% to the quarterly run rate

indicators.note: Tunguz 测算 NVDA 累计股权+贷款承诺 ~$110B；Q1 FY27 营收 $81.6B 推升 LTM 至 $253.5B，比率由 67% 压缩至 ~43%——NVDA 宣布暂停新 AI 初创投注+$800 亿回购，但累计承诺仍远超 Lucent 1999 峰值 24%
indicators.note_en: Tunguz estimates NVDA's cumulative equity+loan commitments at ~$110B; Q1 FY27 revenue of $81.6B lifted LTM to $253.5B, compressing the ratio from 67% to ~43% — NVDA announced a pause on new AI startup bets plus an $80B buyback, but cumulative exposure still far exceeds Lucent's 1999 peak of 24%

indicators.note: S5FI 由上周 45.5% 跃升至 71%（周涨 25.5pp），NVDA 财报超预期+大盘整体走强推动广度显著改善；已远离 40% 红线，技术面由强卖出转为中性偏多
indicators.note_en: S5FI surged from 45.5% last week to 71% (+25.5pp), driven by NVDA's Q1 earnings beat and a broad-based market rally; now well clear of the 40% red line, technicals shifted from Strong Sell to neutral-bullish

indicators.name_zh: 市值加权 vs 等权重
indicators.note: RSP 年至今仍领先 SPY 约 3.35pp（YTD 4.24% vs 0.89%），6 月差约 -3.5%；S5FI 跃升至 71% 印证涨幅仍在向各行业扩散，头部独涨阶段未启动
indicators.note_en: RSP still leads SPY YTD by about 3.35pp (4.24% vs 0.89%), 6-month spread roughly -3.5%; S5FI's jump to 71% confirms gains are broadening across sectors, no top-heavy regime

indicators.name_zh: AI 龙头内部人卖买比
indicators.note: NVDA 内部人 18 个月零买入、累计卖出 $3.3B（Huang $2.9B）；AVGO 过去 3 个月零买入；NVDA 董事会批准 $800 亿回购但个人层面仍以卖出为主；OpenInsider 受限沿用 ~8x
indicators.note_en: NVDA insiders logged zero purchases in 18 months against $3.3B in sales (Huang $2.9B alone); AVGO insider buying remains zero for 3 months; NVDA's board authorized $80B in buybacks but individual-level flows stay sell-heavy; OpenInsider data gated, carrying over ~8x

indicators.threshold_text: 洪流=红 / 升温=黄 / 平静=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Flood = red / Warming = yellow / Quiet = green
indicators.note: SpaceX 5/20 提交 S-1、6/12 上市目标 $1.75T 估值（史上最大 IPO），合并 xAI 后市值由 $1.25T 跃升；Cerebras 上市后持续交投活跃；Anthropic 目标 10 月 $900B、OpenAI Q4 ~$1T；合计 $100-200B 需求超 2025 全年美国 IPO，但具体公司数仍 <10 未达洪流
indicators.note_en: SpaceX filed its S-1 on May 20, targeting a June 12 listing at $1.75T (the largest IPO ever), with xAI merged at a combined $1.25T; Cerebras continues to trade actively; Anthropic eyes October at $900B, OpenAI Q4 at ~$1T; combined demand of $100-200B dwarfs 2025's entire US IPO market, but the count is still under 10 — not yet a Flood

indicators.note: ICE BofA HY OAS 5 月维持在 2.86%（286 bps），较上周 280 bps 微升 6bp 但仍处历史低位；信用市场对 AI capex 激增与市场波动仍未收紧
indicators.note_en: ICE BofA HY OAS holds at 2.86% (286 bps) in May, up 6bp from 280 bps last week but still historically low; credit markets remain unfazed by the AI capex surge and market volatility

indicators.name_zh: 数据中心 ABS 利差
indicators.threshold_text: 走阔 50bps+ = 红 / 稳定 = 黄 / 收窄 = 绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widening 50bps+ = red / Stable = yellow / Tightening = green
indicators.note: CoreWeave 5 月完成 $8.5B 延迟提款贷款（首次获投资级评级 A3/A-），利率 SOFR+225bp / 固息 5.9%——融资成本持续走低印证 DC ABS 市场仍在收紧；累计发行超 $48B
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave closed an $8.5B delayed-draw term loan in May — the first HPC infrastructure facility to earn investment-grade ratings (A3/A-low) — at SOFR+225bp / 5.9% fixed, confirming continued spread compression in the data center ABS space; cumulative issuance exceeds $48B

indicators.note: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda 90 日内无评级下调或违约；CoreWeave Q1 收入 $2.1B（+112% YoY）、积压 $100B、新获投资级评级；但 $25B+ 债务、$4.2B 本年到期、$34B 表外租赁仍是潜在风险
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda — no downgrades or defaults in 90 days; CoreWeave Q1 revenue $2.1B (+112% YoY), backlog $100B, and earned its first investment-grade rating; however $25B+ debt, $4.2B principal due this year, and $34B in off-balance-sheet leases remain latent risks

indicators.name_zh: AI 行业 Token 月度环比
indicators.threshold_text: 收缩=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Contraction = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Anthropic 月处理 250 亿+ API 调用（45% 企业端）；Google 内部 Antigravity token 日处理量 5 月中旬突破 3 万亿（3 月仅 5000 亿、6 倍跃升）；Claude Code 占全球 GitHub 公开提交 4%（环比翻倍），全产业加速
indicators.note_en: Anthropic processes 25B+ API calls per month (45% enterprise); Google's internal Antigravity platform surged past 3T tokens/day by mid-May (6x from 500B in March); Claude Code now authors 4% of all public GitHub commits (doubled MoM) — industry-wide acceleration continues

indicators.name_zh: Token 增速 / 收入增速 比值
indicators.note: Anthropic ARR ~$44B（从 $9B 不到半年，年化 80x 增速），token 量虽爆发但收入增速更快；Claude Code 单工程师月费 $500-2000（Uber 84% 工程师采用），单 token 价值继续上行
indicators.note_en: Anthropic ARR ~$44B (from $9B in under half a year, 80x annualized), and while token volumes surge, revenue growth still outpaces; Claude Code drives $500-2,000/month per engineer (84% adoption at Uber) — per-token value keeps rising

indicators.name_zh: AI 收入增速的二阶导
indicators.threshold_text: 减速=红 / 平稳=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Decel = red / Flat = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Anthropic ARR 序列 Feb $14B → Mar $19B → Apr $30B → 5 月估 $44B（MindStudio/SemiAnalysis 报道每 6 周翻倍），日增 ~$96M；OpenAI ARR $24B（$2B/月）增速被超越；2 阶导持续向上
indicators.note_en: Anthropic ARR trajectory: Feb $14B → Mar $19B → Apr $30B → May est. $44B (MindStudio/SemiAnalysis report doubling every 6 weeks), adding ~$96M/day; OpenAI at $24B ($2B/month) is now growing slower; 2nd derivative firmly positive

indicators.note: McKinsey/Deloitte 2026：72% 企业至少 1 项 AI workload 生产化（2024 55%、2020 20%）；80%+ 新发企业应用嵌入 AI agent（Gartner）；AI agent 生产部署率 31%（银行/保险 47%）；仅 25% 完成 ≥40% pilot 转产
indicators.note_en: McKinsey/Deloitte 2026: 72% of enterprises have at least one AI workload in production (vs 55% in 2024, 20% in 2020); 80%+ of newly shipped apps embed an AI agent (Gartner); agent deployment at 31% (banking/insurance lead at 47%); only 25% moved ≥40% of pilots to production

indicators.threshold_text: 负增长=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Negative = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: MSFT 商业 RPO $392B（+51% YoY）、Azure +40%（供应受限）；GCP 积压 $460B（近翻倍）；AWS 积压超 $150B、收入 +28% 为 15 季最快；Oracle RPO $455B；合计超 $1T
indicators.note_en: MSFT commercial RPO $392B (+51% YoY), Azure +40% supply-constrained; GCP backlog $460B (nearly doubled); AWS backlog >$150B, revenue +28% fastest in 15 quarters; Oracle RPO $455B; combined backlog exceeds $1T

indicators.threshold_text: 任何=红 / 调查=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any confirmed = red / Investigation = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: iLearningEngines（$1.5B 微型公司）4/17 被起诉 round-tripping $144M，但非 AI 龙头；Burry 继续指控 Mag7 通过延长 AI 服务器折旧虚增 $176B 收益；NVDA 否认收到 SEC 调查；仍无主要 AI 公司正式执法
indicators.note_en: iLearningEngines ($1.5B micro-cap) was indicted Apr 17 for $144M in round-tripping, but it is not a major AI company; Burry keeps alleging Mag7 inflates $176B in earnings via extended server depreciation; NVDA denies any SEC probe; no formal enforcement against a major AI player

indicators.threshold_text: 加息=红 / 通胀压力=黄 / 降息=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Hike = red / Inflation pressure = yellow / Cut = green
indicators.note: Warsh 5/15 正式接棒主席，6/16-17 首场 FOMC；联邦基金利率维持 3.50-3.75%，CME 6 月维持概率 97%；JP 摩根预计全年不降息推迟至 2027；Warsh 主张废除点阵图与前瞻指引
indicators.note_en: Warsh officially took the chair on May 15; his first FOMC is June 16-17; fed funds held at 3.50-3.75% with CME showing 97% odds of no change in June; J.P. Morgan forecasts no cuts this year, deferring to 2027; Warsh advocates scrapping the dot plot and forward guidance

indicators.name_zh: 资本开支指引市场反应
indicators.threshold_text: 系统性惩罚=红 / 偶发=黄 / 奖励=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Systematic punishment = red / Episodic = yellow / Rewarded = green
indicators.note: Q1 后 3/4 被惩罚：META -6~10%（capex 上调至 $125-145B 蒸发 $175B 市值）、MSFT 和 AMZN 同步下跌；唯独 GOOGL 上涨（GCP +63% 兑现 capex）；3 罚 + 1 奖——距系统性惩罚一步之遥
indicators.note_en: Post-Q1, three of four hyperscalers were punished: META -6 to -10% (capex raised to $125-145B, erasing $175B in market cap), MSFT and AMZN also fell; only GOOGL rallied (GCP +63% validated the spend); 3 punished + 1 rewarded — one step from 'systematic'

indicators.threshold_text: 普遍承认过热=红 / 部分=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widespread acknowledgment = red / Partial = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 五位关键 CEO 均有对冲：Altman "投资者整体过度兴奋"、Dimon "比别人担心得多、多数人将损失"、Pichai "无公司能免疫泡沫"、Nadella 警告需更广社会影响、Zuckerberg 承认 "泡沫可能性"；频率和强度上升但未达普遍承认过热
indicators.note_en: All five key CEOs now hedge: Altman says investors are 'overexcited'; Dimon is 'far more worried' and warns 'most will lose money'; Pichai says 'no company is immune'; Nadella cautions on 'social permission'; Zuckerberg admits 'a possibility'; frequency rising but short of universal 'overheated' consensus
